content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves gently to the left ahead with the car well-centered on the track, dashed center line visible, and clear track boundaries on both sides.

**Waypoint Analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 74, target = (74 + 5) % 121 = 79
- Target WP79: x=2.2890, y=4.4929
- Car: x=2.3228, y=4.4873, heading=163.17°
- dy = 4.4929 - 4.4873 = 0.0056
- dx = 2.2890 - 2.3228 = -0.0338
- bearing = atan2(0.0056, -0.0338) = 180° - atan(0.0056/0.0338) = 180° - 9.4° = 170.6°
- delta = 170.6° - 163.17° = +7.43°
- |delta| ≈ 7.4°: slight left correction needed, use steering_angle=+5°

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Track curves gently left ahead, car is nearly centered (0.007m from center), delta of +7.4° to WP79 indicates slight left correction needed, so applying +5° steering at full speed.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Positive steering = left turn, negative = right turn",
    "Delta under 5° means steer 0 to avoid oscillation",
    "Delta 5-15° use ±5°; 15-30° use ±10 to ±15°; 30-50° use ±15 to ±20°",
    "Near WP73-80, track runs nearly due west with very small deltas",
    "Speed 1.5 safe on straight/gentle curve sections",
    "Car is very close to center (~0.007m) — avoid overcorrecting",
    "Heading near 163-166° corresponds to west-northwest travel",
    "WP79 lookahead gives small positive delta at this section — gentle left curve",
    "Oversteer warning: avoid excessive correction when near track center",
    "Track curves left after WP74, small positive steering sufficient"
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [2.519, 2.423, 2.323],
    "y": [4.420, 4.447, 4.487],
    "yaw": [166.15, 165.79, 163.17]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": "Target WP79 at (2.289, 4.493): dy=0.006, dx=-0.034, bearing=170.6°, delta=+7.4° → slight left, steer +5°",
  "speed": 1.5,
  "steering_angle": 5.0
}
```
